Notice Of Motion And Motion To Allow The Substitution Of The Personal Representative And The Continuation Of The Action
Off Calendar Dec-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

MYRNA MAYUGA'S Motion To Allow The Substitution Of The Personal Representative And The Continuation Of The Action.

The unopposed motion to allow personal representative Myrna Mayuga to substitute for plaintiff Danilo P. Quiazon is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2025 Continued To Jan-27-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Allow The Substitution Of Successor In Interest And The Continuation Of The Action
Off Calendar Sep-30-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: MYRNA MAYUGA's Motion To Allow The Substitution Of Successor In Interest And The Continuation Of The Action.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion is denied without prejudice. Myrna Mayuga, who seeks to succeed to Danilo P. Quiazon's interest, has not provided evidence to the court that she has been appointed Quiazon's successor in interest in California. The court previously continued the motion to allow for her appointment. The parties now present competing evidence about what other courts are likely to do by the date of hearing on this motion. The court denies the motion without prejudice to its refiling once a successor has been appointed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2025 Continued To Nov-18-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Allow The Substitution Of Successor In Interest And The Continuation Of The Action
Off Calendar Aug-21-2025 Continued To Sep-30-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. Michael Freedman, Esq. of Freedman Law Firm (tel: 415-777-1666) for the Plaintiff.
Atty. Robert White, Esq. of Skootsky & Der LLP (tel: 415-979-9800) for the Defendant.

Hearing Re: OTHER MYRNA MAYUGA's Motion To Allow The Substitution Of Successor In Interest And The Continuation Of The Action.

Matter argued. Counsel Michael Freedman requests the court grant the motion on a conditional basis, or in the alternative, continue the matter. Upon conclusion of discussion, the court grants the alternative form of relief and continues the matter. Plaintiff's counsel is to submit a supplemental brief by September 16, 2025. Defendant's counsel is to submit a supplemental brief by September 23, 2025. The Court continues the matter to September 30, 2025 at 9:00 A.M. in Department 301.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-01-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: DEFENDANT RICO QUIAZON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Rico Quiazon's demurrer is overruled in party and sustained without leave to amend in part. Defendant's request for judicial notice is granted. (CCP 452(h); TSMC North America v. Semiconductor Manufacturing Int'l Corp. (2008) 161 Cal.App.4th 581, 597 n.7; In re Marriage of Taschen (2005) 134 Cal.App.4th 681, 688 n.3.)

(See Word minutes for the complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff: Park. (301/RCE)
